subcodes.first_line: It is abundantly clear that this Wronged One hath, for successive years, been imprisoned in the most desolate of lands, and upon His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: این بسی واضح که این مظلوم در سنین متوالیات در اخرب بلاد مسجون و در سبیل
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @suffering and imprisonment
